data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_IllTradeIfYouWa:
Do you nickname your POKéMON?
I gave a cool name to mine.\pBut when I call my POKéMON by that
name, people laugh at me...\pIf it's okay with you, want to trade
your {STR_VAR_1} for my {STR_VAR_2}?
data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_PleaseBeGoodToM: Eheheheh, ooh, this is so exciting!
data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_ThatIsNoMon: But that's no {STR_VAR_1}.\nTch, that's so disappointing...
data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_WontYouGetCurio: Don't you get curious about what other\npeople named their POKéMON?
data/maps/RustboroCity_House1/text.inc.RustboroCity_House1_Text_AllSortsOfPlace: In all sorts of places, there are all\nsorts of POKéMON and people.\pI find that fascinating, so I go to all\nsorts of places.
